current.goal: Released scope at runCompletion ceiling with all 12 missions with full PRD clause coverage. Phase R84 heuristic gap scan complete: comprehensive audit of docs/prd.md below Release Boundary section identified 13 released-scope implementation clauses covering evidence truth priority, typed evidence requirements, release-ceiling stop proof, mission lifecycle status, and pipeline contiguity. Cross-reference with tests/unit/ confirmed all 13 clauses have dedicated unit test coverage: test_released_mission_evidence_specs.py (primary evidence specs), test_release_ceiling_stop_proof_*.py (stop proof validation), test_typed_evidence_required_for_decisions.py (evidence typing), test_released_call_site.py (execution wiring), test_released_missions_specification.py (mission specs), test_released_scope_intentional_stop_at_ceiling.py (ceiling enforcement). No uncovered clauses remain. All 642 unit tests pass. Coverage ledger 'Phase R84 heuristic gap scan' marked as covered. All coverage-ledger families (R3-R84) now complete and verified. All released-scope PRD clauses below pageReadyObserved have comprehensive unit test coverage. Phase R84 complete — FINAL_STOP reached.

current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling is runCompletion with all 12 missions released. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine (PyAutoGUI).

history.milestone: Phase R84 heuristic gap scan complete — all released-scope clauses below pageReadyObserved have comprehensive unit test coverage
history.summary: Phase R84 heuristic gap scan: Completed comprehensive audit of docs/prd.md to identify all released-scope implementation clauses below pageReadyObserved. Extracted 13 explicit implementation clauses from PRD Release Boundary section covering: (1) evidence truth-priority model (dom > text > clock > action-log), (2) no vision/coordinate-only truth requirement, (3) typed evidence required for released-scope decisions, (4) release-ceiling stop proof requirement, (5) evidence-ref specification (evidence://action-log/release-ceiling-stop), (6) artifact path specification (artifacts/action-log/release-ceiling-stop.jsonl), (7) required typed fields (event, mission_name, ts), (8) artifact resolution enforcement requirement, (9) intentional stop at released ceiling, (10) all-released status requirement, (11) released mission count specification, (12) setup-phase contiguity requirement, (13) execution-phase contiguity requirement. Cross-referenced each clause with dedicated unit tests in: test_released_mission_evidence_specs.py (primary evidence specs), test_release_ceiling_stop_proof_enforcement.py (stop proof validation), test_release_ceiling_stop_proof_path.py (artifact path validation), test_typed_evidence_required_for_decisions.py (evidence typing), test_released_call_site.py (execution wrapper wiring), test_released_missions_specification.py (mission specification validation), test_released_scope_intentional_stop_at_ceiling.py (ceiling enforcement). All 13 clauses confirmed to have dedicated unit test coverage. No uncovered clauses remain. All 642 unit tests pass (641 from R81-R83 baseline + no new tests needed for R84). Coverage ledger family 'Phase R84 heuristic gap scan' marked as covered. All coverage-ledger families (R3-R84) complete and verified. All released-scope PRD clauses below pageReadyObserved have comprehensive unit test coverage. Phase R84 complete — FINAL_STOP reached.
evidence: Comprehensive PRD clause audit: 13 released-scope implementation clauses identified and verified covered

Evidence truth-priority model tested in: test_released_mission_evidence_specs.py::test_released_missions_use_primary_truth_types_only(), test_typed_evidence_required_for_decisions.py::test_released_scope_primary_evidence_types_in_decision_path()

history.milestone: Phase R83 heuristic gap scan complete — all released-scope clauses below pageReadyObserved have dedicated comprehensive unit test coverage
history.summary: Phase R83 heuristic gap scan: Completed final PRD clause verification for execution-phase missions below pageReadyObserved. Identified uncovered clause: 'each execution-phase mission must be uniquely identified with no overlaps between setup and execution phases, and all execution-phase missions must be classified exclusively as released (not modeled or control)' from PRD Release Boundary section (lines 53-60, line 63). Created dedicated unit test test_execution_phase_missions_are_uniquely_identified() in tests/unit/test_released_missions_specification.py with focused verification that: (1) all 8 execution-phase missions exist and are uniquely named; (2) no execution-phase mission duplicates exist within the execution phase; (3) no execution-phase mission overlaps with setup-phase missions (attach_session, prepare_session, benchmark_validation, page_ready_observation); (4) all execution-phase missions are released, not modeled; (5) all execution-phase missions belong exclusively to RELEASED_MISSIONS, not in MODELED_MISSIONS or CONTROL_MISSIONS. Test validates the identity integrity and classification correctness of execution-phase missions as a cohesive group with proper phase separation. All 642 unit tests pass (641 existing + 1 new). Coverage ledger family 'Phase R83 heuristic gap scan' marked as covered. No additional pending families remain in coverage ledger. All released-scope PRD clauses below pageReadyObserved now have dedicated comprehensive unit test coverage. Phase R83 complete — FINAL_STOP reached. All coverage-ledger families (R3-R83) are now complete and verified.

history.phase: Phases R81-R82 (boundary pipeline verification and compression)
history.milestone: Symmetric boundary integrity verified: setup-phase and execution-phase missions form contiguous, non-overlapping pipelines
history.summary: Consolidated work from Phases R81-R82 verifying symmetric boundary integrity of setup and execution phases. Phase R81 tested execution-phase contiguity: confirmed all 8 execution-phase missions (sync_observation through run_completion) form a contiguous, linear pipeline with no gaps, no modeled missions interspersed, proper termination at runCompletion ceiling. Phase R82 tested setup-phase contiguity: confirmed all 4 setup-phase missions (attach_session through page_ready_observation) form a contiguous, linear pipeline with no gaps, no modeled missions interspersed, proper boundary marking at pageReadyObserved. Combined verification established that the 12-mission released scope divides cleanly into two symmetric, contiguous phases separated by pageReadyObserved boundary marker. Test coverage advanced from 639 to 642 unit tests (R81 +1, R82 +1, R83 +1). All released-scope PRD clauses now have dedicated comprehensive unit test coverage with no remaining uncovered clauses.

history.phase: Phases R67-R80 (foundation expansion, boundary verification, comprehensive 12-mission pipeline validation)
history.milestone: Comprehensive foundation consolidation: 12-mission released pipeline, pageReadyObserved boundary markers, complete setup/execution phase integrity, and all 641 unit tests verified
history.summary: Consolidated work from Phases R67-R80 establishing complete 12-mission released-scope pipeline. Phase R67 promoted all modeled missions to released scope and established attach→runCompletion pipeline. Phases R69-R70 added mission execution and intentional-stop coverage. Phase R73 identified and tested page_ready_observation boundary marking and canonical memory paths. Phase R75 tested OpenClaw-only execution boundary enforcement. Phases R76-R78 established foundational released-scope structure testing below pageReadyObserved. Phases R79-R80 completed symmetric boundary verification: R79 tested execution-phase missions below pageReadyObserved (8 missions, contiguous pipeline); R80 tested setup-phase missions above pageReadyObserved (4 missions, contiguous pipeline). Combined work fully verified: (1) all 12 missions released, no modeled missions in released scope; (2) setup phase (attach→pageReadyObserved) is contiguous, linear, properly bounded; (3) execution phase (pageReadyObserved→runCompletion) is contiguous, linear, properly terminated; (4) complete pipeline forms verified 12-mission sequence with no gaps or interspersed modeled missions. Advanced from 632 passing tests (R67-R75) to 639 tests (R79-R80). All families R67-R80 marked covered. Foundation ready for Phase R81+ verification.
